info.title: ABNovaMart APIs
info.description: API Documentation for the ABNovaMart Backend Server

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns an authentication token

400.description: Validation error or user already exists

errors: Password must be at least 6 characters long

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an authentication token

get.description: Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated user
Retrieves all users with pagination (Admin only)
Retrieves the cart for the currently authenticated user

delete.description: Removes all items from the cart for the currently authenticated user

post.summary: Add item to current user's cart
post.description: Adds a product to the cart (or increases quantity if already present)

get.description: Retrieves the cart for a specific user (Admin only)

delete.description: Removes all items from a specific user's cart (Admin only)

post.summary: Add item to a specific user's cart (Admin)
post.description: Adds a product to a specific user's cart (Admin only)
Creates a new product category (Admin only)

parentId.description: Parent category ID for nested categories (optional)

get.description: Retrieves all product categories with pagination and optional search (accessible to all users)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter categories by name

post.description: Creates a new product category (Admin only)

parentId.description: Parent category ID for nested categories (optional)

post.description: Processes the user's cart, creates an order, and initiates payment via Stripe

200.description: Order created successfully, proceed to payment

example.message: Order created successfully. Proceed to payment

get.description: Retrieves all orders for the authenticated user
Retrieves all orders with details (Admin only)

put.description: Updates the payment or order status of an order (Admin only)

get.description: Retrieves a specific product category by its ID (accessible to all users)

put.description: Updates an existing product category (Admin only)

parentId.description: Parent category ID for nested categories (optional)

400.description: Validation error or invalid ID format

parentId.description: Parent category ID for nested categories

created_at.description: Timestamp when the category was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated

userId.description: User ID who placed the order

created_at.description: Timestamp when the order was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated

created_at.description: Timestamp when the product was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default address

created_at.description: Timestamp when the address was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the address was last updated
